$comment: Preset palettes for mighty-diagram. Each maps directly to the SVG :root CSS variables. The DEFAULT palette is 'pwc' (see the 'default' field). The developer may name a preset or supply their own hex values for any subset (unspecified keys keep the default). 'accent' colors the flow arrows, 'frame' the outer boundary, 'subgroup' the dashed internal boundary.

pwc.comment: DEFAULT. PwC brand 'flame' palette: red boundary, dark-orange arrows, light-orange dashed sub-group, warm greys.
pwc.title: #1f1b18
pwc.label: #46403b

reference.comment: Original reference look: maroon frame, orange arrows, blue dashed sub-group.
reference.title: #1a1a1a

monochrome.comment: Near-grayscale, single subtle accent. Good for print/docs.

ocean.comment: Cool blues/teal with a teal accent.
ocean.title: #0f172a

forest.comment: Greens with a fresh green accent.
forest.title: #14271a
forest.label: #33433b
